title: chamaegastrodia poilanei
intro: Chamaegastrodia poilanei is a type of orchid, specifically a genus of terrestrial orchids native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chamaegastrodia poilanei include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve pain. Herbal preparations of Chamaegastrodia poilanei typically involve drying and grinding the roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications.
